# github.gg

> AI-powered GitHub repository analysis platform

## Overview
github.gg provides AI-powered code analysis, developer profiles, repository insights, and documentation generation for GitHub repositories.

## Key Features
- Repository Analysis: Code quality analysis, architecture diagrams, and scorecards
- Developer Profiles: AI-generated developer scorecards and portfolios
- Wiki Generation: Automated documentation and wiki pages from code
- Code Arena: Compare and rank code solutions
- Developer Wrapped: Annual developer statistics and highlights

## Key Pages
- / - Homepage and dashboard
- /[user] - Developer profile page
- /[owner]/[repo] - Repository analysis page
- /[owner]/[repo]/diagram - Architecture diagrams
- /[owner]/[repo]/wiki - Generated wiki documentation
- /[owner]/[repo]/scorecard - Repository quality scorecard
- /arena - Code arena and leaderboard
- /pricing - Subscription plans

## API
- Repository analysis is triggered by visiting github.gg/[owner]/[repo]
- Developer profiles at github.gg/[username]
- Replace github.com URLs with github.gg to analyze any repository

## Contact
- Website: https://github.gg
- GitHub: https://github.com/nicepkg/github.gg
